completedItems: Mounted shared VoiceOrb in the authenticated AppShell for director, teacher, and parent roles.
Implemented local rule-based intent parser for the requested E06 intent schema.
Implemented command bus with preview, confirmation, execution, role permission checks, and error handling.
Implemented text fallback, browser SpeechRecognition entry, ASR provider fallback entry, provider status display, unknown fallback, and command history.
Added /api/voice-assistant/commands using E01 requireSession, AppDataService, and scope-backed server execution.
Added /api/ai/provider-status and /api/ai/voice-asr using E05 authorizeAiRoute and provider resolvers.
Hardened /api/ai/weekly-report payload role authorization before backend forwarding/execution.
Added Node parser tests and E06 Playwright acceptance tests with screenshots.
remainingItems: Real vivo chat/asr enhancement needs E05 env configuration.
assign_task remains preview/permission-only until a stable E01 task assignment API exists.
Full npm run feature:smoke timed out after 20 minutes; E06 targeted Playwright passed.
fixedFindings: Added /api/voice-assistant to proxy API bypass list so unauthenticated calls return JSON 401 instead of login HTML.
Blocked weekly-report AI payload role override attempts by re-authorizing the payload role.
Removed fake ASR success: /api/ai/voice-asr returns provider_unavailable when there is no real provider and no transcript.

providerStatusUsed.fallbackText: 当前使用文本/本地规则 fallback

checks.featureSmoke: timed out after 20 minutes with existing full suite; E06 targeted Playwright passed 5/5

risks: Browser SpeechRecognition availability depends on the end user's browser.
Real vivo ASR/chat is not active until env is configured.
Full existing feature smoke suite did not complete within 20 minutes in this run.
assign_task must not be enabled for execution until an E01 task API is available.
notes: E06 completed the shared framework and base commands. E07/E08/E09 can now extend role-specific skills in parallel.
